description_long: This is an adult male figure with a muscular build, standing upright and shirtless, revealing several tattoos on his chest and arms. He is wearing knee-length shorts with a dark waistband and no visible footwear. His hair is styled in a high, thick, and textured mohawk that extends backward, and he has a choker necklace around his neck. The skin tone is medium to dark, and the body is anatomically proportionate with defined musculature. The figure's back displays additional tattoos and a visible spine line, while the arms hang naturally at his sides. The overall appearance suggests a casual, urban style suitable for street or park environments.
description: A shirtless adult male with a muscular build, knee-length shorts, tattoos, and a distinctive mohawk hairstyle, standing upright in a casual urban style.
description_view_0: Front view showing tattoos on the chest, muscular build, choker necklace, and relaxed arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the mohawk hairstyle, facial features, and the side of the shorts.
description_view_2: Back view displaying tattoos on the upper back, spine line, and the back of the shorts.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the mohawk's extension, arm position, and side profile of the body.
attribute_clothing_type: knee-length casual shorts with a fitted waistband
attribute_hairstyle: high thick mohawk with backward extension
